title: uva argentea
intro: Uva argentea, also known as silver buffalo berry, is a type of shrub or small tree native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Uva argentea include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Uva argentea can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis and gastrointestinal issues.
